_README: Define your own tool: copy this dir to tools/<your-tool>/, fill in, then: monobench run <instance> <your-tool>
name: your-tool
desc: what the tool is and how it reaches the agent
index: legacy fallback only; prefer index_steps. Simple argv strings only, no shell operators.
skill: skill.md                      (a file in THIS dir, injected as system prompt / prepended to the niia prompt so the agent knows how to use the tool; "" = none. Put a skill.md next to this.)
deliver: cli | mcp | none           (cli = available via Bash + skill text; mcp = first-class tools auto-injected; none = baseline)
forfeit_grep: regex over the index command's output; if it matches, the tool FORFEITS this instance (it could not index the repo)
